summary: Full backend + frontend testing of the Wilson fundraiser site. All 9 pytest backend tests pass (stats, CRUD, validations, aggregation). Frontend Playwright run validated hero, header, donation methods (MBWay/Revolut copy 913419879 to clipboard with sonner toast), goal/progress, journey 3 steps, pledge form validation (empty name + empty amount show toast errors), successful pledge creates contributor on wall and updates stats (2→3 contributors, 36€→43€ raised), and team footer shows all 6 names.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py stores created_at as ISO string but model declares it as datetime; the list endpoint re-parses it which works but could be simplified by keeping a consistent type.
POST /api/contributors returns 200 — semantically 201 Created would be more correct, but not blocking.
Pledge form lacks per-field inline error messages (uses sonner toasts only). Works but not ideal for accessibility/screen-readers.
seed_data_creation: Inserted ~3 TEST_ prefixed contributors (TEST_Joana, TEST_Ana, TEST_UI_<rand>) into MongoDB during tests. These remain in the database and contribute to the live raised total. Main agent may want to purge TEST_ prefixed docs before launch.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested functionality works end-to-end. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_fundraiser.py is reusable as a regression suite. Frontend uses sonner toasts for validation feedback (not DOM error nodes), so test using toast text selectors like 'Põe o teu nome' or 'valor válido'. Clipboard tests require granting clipboard-read/write permissions to the Playwright context.
